/tmp/codeql-scratch-6feca9691a3b4459/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/md2html.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/md2html.dir/cmdline.c.o CMakeFiles/md2html.dir/md2html.c.o -o md2html  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/tinta/tinta/_codeql_build_dir/_deps/md4c-build/src: ../src/libmd4c-html.so.0.5.2 ../src/libmd4c.so.0.5.2
